title: helichrysum italicum subsp. microphyllum
intro: Helichrysum italicum subsp. microphyllum, also known as the small-leaved currant or small-leaved strawflower, is a subspecies of the Helichrysum italicum plant, belonging to the daisy family Asteraceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, derived from its essential oils. The health benefits of Helichrysum italicum subsp. microphyllum include reducing inflammation and pain, improving wound healing, and providing protection against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in various forms, such as essential oil, tincture, and dried flowers, which can be used in aromatherapy, skincare, and traditional medicine.
